title: PropFuel API Credentials
description: PropFuel data-export API credentials. A per-app bearer Token authorizes the data-export feed; AccountID scopes the feed to the tenant (the feed lives at /dataexport/{AccountID}/list). Both are issued by PropFuel; the AccountID is per-tenant configuration and is never hardcoded.

Token.description: Per-app bearer token issued by PropFuel. Sent as the Authorization: Bearer header on every data-export request.
Token.title: API Token

AccountID.description: PropFuel account/tenant identifier. Scopes the data-export feed path (/dataexport/{AccountID}/list).
AccountID.title: Account ID
